statistics.name: assists
statistics.description: The number of times a player who passes the ball to a teammate in a way that leads to a score by field goal, meaning that he or she was "assisting" in the basket. There is some judgment involved in deciding whether a passer should be credited with an assist.

statistics.description: The number of times a player loses possession to the other team.

statistics.description: The average number of assists a player or team records per turnover

article.description: A.J. English scored 25 points and dished out 10 assists to lift Iona to its first win of the season, 92-77 over Delaware Friday night.
article.headline: Iona takes down Delaware 92-77 for first win of the season
article.linkText: Iona takes down Delaware 92-77 for first win of the season
article.story: NEW ROCHELLE, N.Y. -- A.J. English scored 25 points and dished out 10 assists to lift Iona to its first win of the season, 92-77 over Delaware Friday night. English was 6-for-13 shooting from the field and made all 10 free-throw attempts. Schadrac Casmir had 16 points as all five starters scored in double figures for Iona (1-2). Marvin King-Davis led Delaware (1-1) with 16 points, and the Blue Hens also had five starters in double figures. English reeled off three straight 3-pointers in just a little more than a minute to give Iona a 25-16 lead. It jump-started a 31-19 run that gave the Gaels a 12-point lead at the half. English's 3's and four free throws were part of the run. The Blue Hens closed the gap to 47-41 in the second half on two free throws by King-Davis' but could get no closer.
